included_categories: Positive scenarios for successful registration, email verification, and resend verification
Negative scenarios for invalid email format, duplicate email, password violations, expired verification link, and rate limit exceeded
Validation scenarios for email format (simplified RFC 5322), password length, password complexity, password spaces, password personal info, and disposable email blocking
Boundary scenarios for password length (8 and 64 characters), rate limit windows (15 minutes, 1 hour, 30-minute lockout), resend cooldown (60 seconds), and verification link expiration (24 hours)
Business rule scenarios for unique email, disposable email blocking, password personal info check, and rate limit enforcement
Security scenarios for rate limiting on account creation and resend verification, IP-based blocking, and email verification before first login

UX/UI scenarios for error messages as specified (duplicate email, invalid password length, invalid email format) and missing error messages for password spaces, personal info, disposable email, and rate limits (noted as open questions)

excluded_categories.reason: No permission or role-based access control is mentioned in the requirement summary.
No external dependencies (e.g., email service, database) are explicitly identified for test scope; the email delivery service is assumed reliable per assumptions.
No network-specific requirements (e.g., latency, connectivity, protocol) are defined.
No localization or multi-language requirements beyond the specified Vietnamese error messages are mentioned.
No timezone-related requirements (e.g., expiration time handling across timezones) are specified.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive scenarios for successful registration with valid email and password, successful email verification, and successful resend of verification email after cooldown.

Generate negative scenarios for each validation rule: invalid email format, duplicate email, password too short (<8), password too long (>64), missing uppercase, missing lowercase, missing digit, missing special character, password containing spaces, password containing personal info (e.g., user's name), and disposable email provider.

Generate boundary scenarios for password length exactly 8 and 64 characters, rate limit windows (5 attempts within 15 minutes, 3 attempts within 1 hour, 30-minute lockout), resend cooldown exactly 60 seconds, and verification link expiration exactly 24 hours.
Generate business rule scenarios for unique email enforcement, disposable email blocking, and password personal info check (using user's name as part of password).

Generate security scenarios for IP-based rate limiting on account creation (5 attempts per IP per 15 minutes) and resend verification (3 attempts per account or IP per hour with 30-minute lockout), and prevention of login before email verification.

Generate UX/UI scenarios for specified error messages: 'Email này đã được đăng ký. Vui lòng đăng nhập hoặc sử dụng email khác.' for duplicate email, 'Mật khẩu phải có độ dài từ 8 đến 64 ký tự.' for password length/complexity, and 'Địa chỉ email không đúng định dạng. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại.' for invalid email format. Note that error messages for password spaces, personal info, disposable email, and rate limits are open questions and should not be generated.

Do not generate scenarios for open questions: specific disposable email provider list, behavior after verification link expiration (e.g., re-registration vs. new link), and unspecified error messages.
